title: Make graph-owned host p1 checkpoint-restorable and common-evaluator visible
description: Extend the repaired production ownership contract through serialization and frozen reevaluation so AdaptiveWise graph.p1 is not silently lost after training; preserve backward compatibility for checkpoints whose EMA already includes graph.p1 and fail closed when parameter topology is ambiguous.
acceptance_criteria: New checkpoints explicitly bind graph state and parameter-order metadata; common frozen evaluation composes the same model-plus-graph training parameter order as production, validates EMA shapes/counts, applies host graph.p1 before sampling, and rejects ambiguous legacy topology. A round-trip regression proves nonuniform graph.p1 survives save/load/evaluation setup while proposal-adaptive model-owned p1 behavior remains unchanged.
review_initial_requirements: Trace save, load, EMA, optimizer, graph construction, and frozen evaluator object identity; verify no checkpoint metric or model-selection logic changes.
review_regression_requirements: Run checkpoint retention, frozen evaluator, E1 trace, proposal graph, and focused queue regressions; inspect produced checkpoint keys and exact restored p1 tensor.

Only if every condition passes may one new controller be launched; otherwise record FAIL and do not train.
